name: Urban Ecosystem Integration Strategy
consequences: Immediate: Blends LA, Detroit, and Miami architectural motifs into a cohesive urban grid → Systemic: Increases player engagement by 18% (per beta test metrics) but raises asset creation costs by 22% → Strategic: Accelerates world-building scalability but risks narrative coherence in mixed-era environments. Controls authenticity vs. efficiency. Weakness: The options fail to consider real-world urban planning data integration.

Implement dynamic weather and time-of-day systems to mask architectural inconsistencies

review: Controls authenticity vs. efficiency. Weakness: The options fail to consider real-world urban planning data integration.
